rationale: The "fail · can you win?" hook framing is broadly hypercasual-friendly and shares an audience with Helix Jump, but the specific bus-parking/traffic-jam puzzle scenario has zero mechanical overlap with rotating a helix tower and bouncing a ball — there's no parking, pathing, or vehicle metaphor in the game to translate. Visually the flat white/red/green palette and top-down vehicle staging clash with Helix Jump's 3D neon tower aesthetic. Recommend skipping a literal port; if you want to borrow anything, only steal the "WHY IS THIS LEVEL SO HARD" overlay pattern and apply it to a genuine helix near-miss fail clip.
